title: Sections
description: Per-route section grammar for a Scaffold. Locked by ADR 0013 so future scaffolds cannot drift from local-service-business' shape. Top-level keys are route IDs (matching routes.json defaultRoutes[*].id); each route declares the sections that are required, optional and how they may be ordered.

requiredSections.description: Section IDs that codegen MUST emit for this route.

optionalSections.description: Section IDs that codegen MAY emit when the brief justifies them.

sectionOrderRules.description: Free-form natural-language constraints that codegen has to honour (e.g. 'hero must be first', 'CTA above the fold').
